aids.title: C-D-S-T: CV Tasks
aids.content:
**C**lassification (What is it?)
**D**etection (Where is it?)
**S**egmentation (Which pixels?)
**T**racking (Where is it going?)

aids.title: OISVI - CV Challenges
aids.content:
**O**cclusion
**I**llumination
**S**cale
**V**iewpoint
**I**ntra-class variation

Remember: 'Oh I See Very Interesting' challenges!

aids.title: CV is Like Teaching a Baby to See
aids.content: Computer Vision is like teaching a baby to see. First, the baby learns to recognize simple shapes (edges), then objects (features), then understands scenes (context). Deep learning = millions of examples to learn, just like a child sees millions of objects growing up.

aids.title: CV Pipeline: AFAD
aids.content:
**A**cquire -> **F**ilter -> **A**nalyze -> **D**ecide

Every CV system follows this flow: get image, clean it, understand it, act on it.
